title: Korak 49

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
NUMBER_OF_DISKS = 4
rods = {
    'A': list(range(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, 0, -1)),
    'B': [],
    'C': []
}

def move(n, source, auxiliary, target):
    if n > 0:
        # move n - 1 disks from source to auxiliary, so they are out of the way
        move(n - 1, source, auxiliary, target)
        
        # move the nth disk from source to target
        rods[target].append(rods[source].pop())
        
        # display our progress
        print(rods, '\n')
              
# initiate call from source A to target C with auxiliary B
move(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, 'A', 'B', 'C')
challengeFiles.seed:
NUMBER_OF_DISKS = 4
rods = {
    'A': list(range(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, 0, -1)),
    'B': [],
    'C': []
}

def move(n, source, auxiliary, target):
    if n > 0:
        # move n - 1 disks from source to auxiliary, so they are out of the way
        move(n - 1, source, auxiliary, target)
        
        # move the nth disk from source to target
        rods[target].append(rods[source].pop())
        
        # display our progress
        print(rods, '\n')
              
# initiate call from source A to target C with auxiliary B
move(NUMBER_OF_DISKS, 'A', 'B', 'C')

tests.text: Trebalo bi da promeniš redosled argumenata u tvom pozivu za move(n - 1, source, auxiliary, target).

description:
U početku, dodani rekurzivni poziv (recursive call) rešava mali izazov prebacivanja n - 1 diska na drugi šapi.

Zbog toga, argument target se odnosi na vašu drugu poziciju, dok je argument auxiliary treća pozicija. Zapamtite da će menjati poziciju kako ponavljanje nastavlja.

Ispravite redosled argumenata menjanjem target i auxiliary u vašem ponovnom pozivu.
